ABM.caption: Locale
ABM.doc: BCP 47 locale tag. e.g.: en-US, ja-JP, de-DE, pt-BR, ar-EG
ABM.name: locale

ABN.caption: Time zone
ABN.doc: IANA timezone identifier. e.g.: America/New_York, Europe/Berlin, Asia/Tokyo. Leave empty for the user's local timezone.
ABN.name: timeZone

ABP.caption: Mode
ABP.doc: "preset" uses Date style / Time style for quick formatting. "custom" uses individual component fields (weekday, year, month, etc.) for full control. These two modes are mutually exclusive in the Intl API.
ABP.name: mode

ABQ.caption: Date style
ABQ.doc: Preset date style (only used in preset mode). "full" = Thursday, March 6, 2026. "long" = March 6, 2026. "medium" = Mar 6, 2026. "short" = 3/6/26. "none" = omit date portion.
ABQ.name: dateStyle

ABR.caption: Time style
ABR.doc: Preset time style (only used in preset mode). "full" = 6:43:25 AM Central European Standard Time. "long" = 6:43:25 AM GMT+1. "medium" = 6:43:25 AM. "short" = 6:43 AM. "none" = omit time portion.
ABR.name: timeStyle

ABT.caption: Weekday
ABT.doc: Only used in custom mode. "long" = Thursday. "short" = Thu. "narrow" = T. "none" = omit.
ABT.name: weekday

ABU.caption: Year
ABU.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 2026. "2-digit" = 26. "none" = omit.
ABU.name: year

ABV.caption: Month
ABV.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 3. "2-digit" = 03. "long" = March. "short" = Mar. "narrow" = M. "none" = omit.
ABV.name: month

ABW.caption: Day
ABW.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 6. "2-digit" = 06. "none" = omit.
ABW.name: day

ABX.caption: Hour
ABX.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 6. "2-digit" = 06. "none" = omit.
ABX.name: hour

ABY.caption: Minute
ABY.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 43. "2-digit" = 43. "none" = omit.
ABY.name: minute

ABZ.caption: Second
ABZ.doc: Only used in custom mode. "numeric" = 25. "2-digit" = 25. "none" = omit.
ABZ.name: second

ACA.caption: Hour cycle
ACA.doc: Only used in custom mode when Hour is set. "h12" = 12-hour clock with AM/PM. "h23" = 24-hour clock (0-23). "h24" = 24-hour clock (1-24). "h11" = 12-hour clock (0-11). "auto" = follow locale default.
ACA.name: hourCycle

ACC.caption: End date
ACC.doc: If provided, formats a date range using formatRange(). e.g.: "Jan 5 – 10, 2026". Uses the same style settings as the main date.
ACC.name: end_date

ACE.caption: Advanced options (JSON)
ACE.doc: Raw JSON passed directly to Intl.DateTimeFormat constructor. When set, ALL other options except locale are ignored. Must be valid JSON.
ACE.name: advanced_options

ABI.caption: Formatted range
ABI.doc: The formatted date range string. Empty if no end date is provided.
ABI.name: formatted_range

ABJ.caption: Formatted parts (JSON)
ABJ.doc: JSON output from formatToParts() for custom rendering. Each part has a 'type' and 'value'.
ABJ.name: formatted_parts

ABK.caption: Error message
ABK.doc: Empty when formatting succeeds. Contains an error description if formatting fails (e.g., invalid timezone, bad JSON in advanced options).
ABK.name: error_message
